no: Abandoned — old Beamdog forum thread, author (Xavioria) inactive. LN Female Halfling Ranger (Stalker).

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Adds Margarita Zelleod, a Lawful Neutral halfling stalker NPC companion with custom dialogue, NPC banters, and a mysterious backstory as a courier.

co.n: Margarita for Baldur's Gate: Enhanced Edition
co.tp2n: Margarita for Baldur's Gate: Enhanced Edition
